name: Venture Global, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Our Company Venture Global is a long-term, low-cost provider of U.S. LNG sourced from resource rich North American natural gas basins. Our integrated assets span the LNG supply chain, including LNG production, natural gas transportation, shipping and regasification. Our innovative approach, which is both scalable and repeatable, allows us to bring low-cost LNG to a global market years faster than traditional LNG projects. We believe supplying this clean, affordable fuel promotes ...
